case_title: HAMPTON GOLDEN GATE ASSOCIATES, LP VS. ARMANDO CHAN SULUB et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAMPTON GOLDEN GATE ASSOCIATES, LP AS TO DEFENDANT SULUB, ARMANDO CHAN DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT SULUB, ARMANDO CHAN

HEARING ON APPLICANT/ARMANDO SULUB'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. ARMANDO CHAN SULUB HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: D.LOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, #4280 (D206)
